title: The Plagues of Orath
notes: Collection/anthology row present; individual contents not explicitly recoverable from TLBranson list.

curation.synopsis: A creeping plague stirs on the quiet agri-world of Orath, and the Ultramarines and their Doom Eagles allies race to find its source before the contagion consumes a sector. Across three linked novellas, Librarian Vabion uncovers the rot's origin, Captain Galenus brings the Chapter's engines of war to bear in grinding tank battles, and Chaplain Sentina faces a final, daemon-haunted reckoning where only the ultimate sacrifice can win the day. From the first whisper of sickness to all-out war against the servants of decay, this is the complete tale of the battle for Orath.
